conversation.text: I'm not really sure if this is right for us, we're quite small.

totally get that. actually size isn't the big factor, it's just whether missing leads is costing you at the moment|||no pressure at all, even if you just wanted some free advice on how to handle the flow better, Louis is happy to chat. want me to send the link? no obligation whatsoever
That's very kind. Maybe a quick chat wouldn't hurt.
exactly, at worst you walk away with a better idea of how to fix your lead gen. grab a time whenever suits you|||https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
